flags.name: Fosroc Ronaform
flags.evidence: No 'Ronaform' product exists on fosroc.com.au, fosroc.com or the AU catalogue; name is a confusion. Fosroc AU release agents are the 'Form Release Agent' SKU and the global Reebol Emulsion line. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/form-release-agent ; https://www.fosroc.com/product/show/reebol-emulsion

flags.name: Tremco Eucocrete WB Cure
flags.evidence: No 'Eucocrete WB Cure' in Tremco CPG Australia catalogue; 'Eucocrete' is their repair-mortar family, not a curing compound. The genuine AU water-based acrylic curing compound is Tremco Evencure AC (AS 3799). https://www.tremco.com.au/products/surface-treatments/curing-compounds

flags.name: Westox RAP Adhesive
flags.evidence: Westox RAP is a heritage plaster-lath-ceiling reinstatement system, not a concrete re-alkalisation product. RAP Adhesive is a liquid water-based acrylic adhesive/primer (5/20 L), not a cementitious primer. https://westox.com/product/rap-adhesive/

flags.name: Westox RAP Primer DG
flags.evidence: Westox's own page describes RAP Primer DG as a penetrating primer for wood-lath ceiling reinstatement / re-establishing adhesion of drummy plaster, NOT a carbonated-concrete re-alkalisation primer. https://westox.com/product/rap-primer-dg/

flags.name: Westox RAP Thickened Adhesive
flags.reason: misplaced -> heritage plaster-lath ceiling system (not a cementitious repair adhesive)
flags.evidence: Gun-grade thickened member of the Westox RAP plaster-lath-ceiling system; it is a thickened acrylic adhesive, not a cementitious concrete repair adhesive. https://westox.com/product/rap-thickened-adhesive/

flags.name: Sika MonoTop FC
flags.evidence: Sika AU PDS: polymer-modified cementitious fairing/finishing mortar, fine aggregates, max 3 mm/layer, off-form-concrete finish; Sika markets it as a Fairing Coat. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-fc.html

flags.name: Sika MonoTop-723 N
flags.evidence: Sika AU PDS: polymer-modified surfacing/finishing mortar, R3, pore-sealer/levelling mortar for minor defects (pores, honeycombing), up to 5 mm/layer - a fairing/levelling coat rather than a structural patch mortar. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-723n.html

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-412 NFG
recommendations.type: R4 fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar (with corrosion inhibitor)
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's flagship structural patch mortar; notable gap in the cementitious range. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-412nfg.html

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-352 NFG
recommendations.type: R3 fibre-reinforced lightweight hand-applied repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Common vertical/overhead R3 patch mortar; complements the R4 412 NFG. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-352nfg.html

recommendations.name: Renderoc HB40
recommendations.type: high-build cementitious repair mortar, R3, ~45 MPa
recommendations.reason: Core current Fosroc AU structural patch mortar; widely specified. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40

recommendations.name: Mapegrout T60
recommendations.type: R4 sulphate-resistant fibre-reinforced thixotropic repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU's principal R4 structural repair mortar; should be represented. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapegrout-t60

recommendations.name: Renderoc GP
recommendations.reason: The true general-purpose Fosroc PM repair mortar (the listed 'Renderoc G' is actually a geopolymer corrosion-resistant lining mortar). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-gp

recommendations.name: Renderoc FC
recommendations.type: cementitious fairing coat (<=3 mm) for fair-faced finish
recommendations.reason: Standard Fosroc AU fairing coat; this subcategory currently has only one Westox product. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-fc

recommendations.name: Mapefinish
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU smoothing/fairing mortar for fair-faced concrete; broadens brand coverage. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products

recommendations.name: Nitomortar S
recommendations.reason: Ready-mixed Fosroc epoxy repair mortar (the listed Nitomortar 903 is an epoxy binder/screed system, not a ready repair mortar). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitomortar-s

recommendations.name: Eporip
recommendations.type: solvent-free 2-part epoxy adhesive for old-to-new concrete bonding
recommendations.reason: Widely used Mapei AU structural epoxy bonding adhesive; no Mapei epoxy present in this subcategory. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/eporip

recommendations.name: Mapefer 1K
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU's standard anti-rust rebar primer; no Mapei rebar primer currently listed. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-1010
recommendations.reason: Sika AU successor/companion to MonoTop-910 N; dual rebar-protection + bonding role. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars

recommendations.name: Mapei Planicrete
recommendations.type: SBR synthetic-rubber latex bonding agent / mortar admixture
recommendations.reason: Correct Mapei AU SBR bonding agent (the listed 'Planicrete AC' is the North American name; AU SKUs are Planicrete / Planicrete SP). https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/planicrete

recommendations.name: Nitobond EP
recommendations.reason: Common Fosroc AU epoxy bonding agent; the subcategory holds only SBR/acrylic latex products. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitobond-ep

recommendations.name: Conbextra GP
recommendations.reason: Most widely specified Fosroc AU structural grout; no Fosroc grout currently listed. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/conbextra-gp

recommendations.name: Conbextra HF
recommendations.reason: Standard high-flow Fosroc AU precision grout for tight clearances. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/conbextra-hf

recommendations.name: SikaGrout-212 HP
recommendations.type: non-shrink dual-expansion high-performance cementitious structural grout
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's principal structural grout (anchor bolts, bearing pads, 10-100 mm). https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/grouts-anchoring/cementitious-grouts/sikagrout-212-hpau.html

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-436N
recommendations.type: pourable self-compacting R4 micro-concrete repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's pourable/flowable R4 mortar - the nearest Sika equivalent to a micro-concrete; complements the single Mapei entry in this subcategory. (Currently listed under Cementitious Repair Mortars.) https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-436n.html

recommendations.name: Tremco Evencure AC
recommendations.reason: Correct Tremco CPG Australia curing compound (replaces the non-existent 'Eucocrete WB Cure'). https://www.tremco.com.au/products/evencure-ac

recommendations.name: Sika Antisol AC
recommendations.reason: Genuine Sika AU acrylic curing compound (the listed Antisol-15 SF is a curing/dustproofing/hardening membrane, not specifically acrylic). https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete/admixture-technology/special-admixtures/sika-antisol-ac.html
